name: Goldilocks' Gourmet Spinach Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Mushrooms, fresh, washed, dried, trimmed and diced
1/4 pound Cream cheese, softened and cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach; trim, cook, and chop.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan.
3. Sauté mushrooms and scallion until tender.
4. Add flour and stir until cooked for a couple of minutes.
5. Whisk in chicken broth and then milk, stirring until thickened.
6. Add salt if desired, pepper, nutmeg if desired, cream cheese, and Swiss cheese; stir until melted.
7. Stir in spinach.
8. Heat gently and stir to combine.
9. Season to taste. Serve hot.
